test_strategy_covers_unit_integration_e2.evidence: test-strategy.md covers unit (48 tests, 63%), integration (20 tests, 26%), E2E (8 tests, 11%). Performance thresholds defined. Security covered via V8 exception testing.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.evidence: 76 test cases across 4 test files covering REQ-0051 FR-001/002/004/005 and REQ-0052 FR-001/002/003/004/006/007. FR-003 (REQ-0051) and FR-005 (REQ-0052) are intent detection (behavioral/doc, not code-testable).

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: traceability-matrix.csv has 81 rows mapping 34 unique requirement+AC pairs to 76 test cases. 100% code-testable AC coverage.

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: >=80% line coverage target (per Article II). 100% coverage for critical paths (state mutation, V8 exception, error handling).

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: test-data-plan.md defines 6 fixture types, boundary values table, invalid inputs table, maximum-size inputs table, and factory function pattern.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: 5 critical paths identified: retry state clearing, rollback multi-phase reset, V8 recovery_action exception, error paths, count tracking.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Test-First Development
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: 76 test cases designed before implementation. Unit/integration/E2E coverage planned. >=80% line coverage target set.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Artifact Traceability
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: Traceability matrix maps 34 unique ACs to 76 test cases. 100% requirement coverage. No orphan tests.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Quality Gate Integrity
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: All 6 GATE-04 checklist items pass. All required artifacts (test-strategy.md, test-cases.md, traceability-matrix.csv, test-data-plan.md) exist.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Integration Testing Integrity
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: 8 integration tests validate cross-module interactions: retry/rollback scripts with V8 checkPhaseFieldProtection, recovery action lifecycle, double retry/rollback sequences.
